feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def read_sql(name):
    return (ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="ascii")


def make_db():
    db = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    db.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON")
    db.executescript(
        """
        CREATE TABLE registry_object (
            object_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            object_kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (object_kind IN ('supplier', 'depot')),
            display_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            established_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            synced_at TEXT NOT NULL
        );
        CREATE TABLE registry_binding (
            binding_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            object_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES registry_object(object_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            binding_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
            binding_value TEXT NOT NULL,
            expires_at TEXT
        );
        """
    )
    return db


def test_supplier_sync_retains_its_established_record():
    db = make_db()
    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO registry_object VALUES ('supplier-7', 'supplier', 'Northwind', '2024-01-10T10:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')"
    )
    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO registry_binding VALUES (1, 'supplier-7', 'contract', 'net-30', NULL)"
    )

    cursor = db.execute(
        read_sql("refresh_supplier.sql"),
        {
            "object_id": "supplier-7",
            "display_name": "Northwind Components",
            "established_at": "2026-07-10T12:00:00Z",
            "synced_at": "2026-07-10T12:00:00Z",
        },
    )

    assert cursor.rowcount == 1
    assert db.execute("SELECT * FROM registry_object").fetchone() == (
        "supplier-7",
        "supplier",
        "Northwind Components",
        "2024-01-10T10:00:00Z",
        "2026-07-10T12:00:00Z",
    )
    assert db.execute("SELECT binding_id, binding_value FROM registry_binding").fetchall() == [
        (1, "net-30")
    ]


def test_depot_sync_retains_its_established_record():
    db = make_db()
    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO registry_object VALUES ('depot-4', 'depot', 'Harbor', '2023-08-05T07:30:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')"
    )
    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO registry_binding VALUES (2, 'depot-4', 'route', 'coastal', NULL)"
    )

    cursor = db.execute(
        read_sql("refresh_depot.sql"),
        {
            "object_id": "depot-4",
            "display_name": "Harbor West",
            "established_at": "2026-07-11T14:00:00Z",
            "synced_at": "2026-07-11T14:00:00Z",
        },
    )

    assert cursor.rowcount == 1
    assert db.execute("SELECT * FROM registry_object").fetchone() == (
        "depot-4",
        "depot",
        "Harbor West",
        "2023-08-05T07:30:00Z",
        "2026-07-11T14:00:00Z",
    )
    assert db.execute("SELECT binding_id, binding_value FROM registry_binding").fetchall() == [
        (2, "coastal")
    ]
